title: saxifraga nelsoniana subsp. reniformis
intro: Saxifraga nelsoniana subsp. reniformis, also known as the Reniform Saxifrage, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Saxifraga genus. It is used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a tea or infusion to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
